surface_sign.text: A rusted pipe protrudes from the dune at an angle — someone marked this spot. Digging around it reveals the top of a steel drum buried just below the surface.

choices.label: Dig out the drum and pry it open.

drum_cache.text: Three drums buried in a row. One has corroded through, but two are sealed tight. Fuel, from the weight. Further digging reveals a fourth drum with a different shape — a storage cylinder.

choices.label: Break the seal on the storage cylinder.

storage_cylinder.text: The cylinder holds a vacuum-sealed bundle: spare parts, a compact water filter, and two sealed ration packs. Military surplus, pre-war issue.

sand_collapse.text: The dune shifts. You're buried to the waist before you drag yourself free, lungs full of ash-dust.

pressurized_gas.text: The cylinder vents with a sharp crack. Chemical propellant burns your face and hands.
